message:
test(search-core): add 41 tests for embedding job infrastructure

Expand embedding_jobs.rs from 15 to 56 tests covering:
- EmbeddingRequest: constructor field verification, dedup_key
  semantics (id+kind), no-project-id variant
- EmbeddingQueue: Default trait, config() accessor, is_empty after
  drain, drain on empty/oversized, stats accuracy, retry dedup
  drops duplicate, backpressure_threshold=1, backpressure includes
  retry queue, enqueue after drain recovery, dedup replaces
  existing body in main queue
- JobMetrics: Default all-zero, multiple record_batch accumulation,
  avg_embed_time_us calculation, zero-docs division safety
- JobResult: Skipped variant is not success/retry, Retryable is
  not success
- BatchResult: Default total=0, serde roundtrip
- QueueStats: Default, serde roundtrip
- EmbeddingJobConfig: full defaults, serde roundtrip
- RefreshWorkerConfig: serde roundtrip
- RebuildResult: Default, serde roundtrip
- JobMetricsSnapshot: serde roundtrip with avg calculation
- NoProgress: callable without panic
- IndexRefreshWorker: last_refresh initially None, shutdown flag
  control, empty cycle returns 0, no rebuild without flag,
  metrics returns runner's shared Arc
- EmbeddingJobRunner: has_work on empty/nonempty, shared metrics
  Arc, FixedEmbedder batch processing, batch_limit smaller than
  batch_size, batch_limit=0 clamps to 1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
